# Media Records Collection (Firestore)

Collection: `media_files`

Document example:

```json
{
  "id": "autogenerated_doc_id",
  "ownerId": "firebase_uid",
  "ownerEmail": "user@example.com",
  "folder": "payment-proofs",
  "access": "protected",
  "source": "hostinger-filesystem",
  "fileName": "payment-proof-1713277812345-abcd1234ef56.webp",
  "originalFileName": "Screenshot 2026-04-16.png",
  "extension": "png",
  "mimeType": "image/png",
  "sizeBytes": 284331,
  "storagePath": "uploads/payment-proofs/payment-proof-1713277812345-abcd1234ef56.webp",
  "publicPath": "",
  "protectedPath": "/api/upload/autogenerated_doc_id",
  "fileUrl": "https://your-domain.com/api/upload/autogenerated_doc_id",
  "relatedType": "order",
  "relatedId": "HT-2604161010-AB12",
  "relatedUserId": "firebase_uid",
  "relatedOrderId": "HT-2604161010-AB12",
  "relatedProductId": "",
  "note": "",
  "createdAt": "serverTimestamp",
  "updatedAt": "serverTimestamp"
}
```

Recommended indexes (optional):

- `ownerId + createdAt desc`
- `relatedType + relatedId + createdAt desc`
- `folder + createdAt desc`
- `access + createdAt desc`
